items.name: 💜 Neo Phantom Coat [PBR]
items.description:
Step out of the shadows in the Neo Phantom Coat, a jet-black trench traced with luminous violet energy lines. Designed for those who walk between worlds — digital and real — this outfit radiates mystery and high-tech mastery.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
🖤 Dark futuristic coat with glowing purple accents
⚡ Sleek, minimal silhouette that exudes authority and edge
✨ PBR materials create realistic shine and texture contrast
💀 Perfect for hackers, void mages, or cyber assassins
🔍 Keywords: black, purple, neon, coat, cyberpunk, futuristic, trench, PBR, tech, Roblox
Disappear into the digital night —
the Neo Phantom Coat leaves only a trail of violet light. 💫

items.name: 🧊 Glacier Sentinel Coat [PBR]
items.description:
Command the frozen frontier with the Glacier Sentinel Coat — a gleaming silver armor jacket sculpted from icy alloys. Its heavy plating and frosted edges give the perfect mix of arctic elegance and battle-ready style.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Frosted metallic armor coat with a futuristic design ❄️
PBR textures for ultra-realistic reflections and depth
Perfect for ice warriors, sci-fi pilots, or frost guardians
Balanced between fashion and function — cold never looked this cool
🔍 Keywords: ice, armor, frost, arctic, silver, futuristic, warrior, sci-fi, cyber, PBR, Roblox
Become the guardian of the frozen world —
the Glacier Sentinel Coat turns every chill into power. ⚔️❄️
